Subject: A tiny baby
Theme: Exploring a messy trash-strewn street corner
Event: The tiny baby crawled near the overflowing trash cans, reaching out to touch the sticky food wrappers, instantly recoiling with a look of disgust at the foul smell and grime.
story_prompts: The same A tiny baby crawled cautiously on a grimy street corner, eyes wide with curiosity, surrounded by scattered dirty wrappers fluttering in the breeze against cracked concrete pavement.
The same A tiny baby inched closer to a toppled trash can, tentatively touching the edge, while discarded fast food wrappers littered the foreground and grimy alley walls loomed behind.
The same A tiny baby reached out to sticky food wrappers near an overflowing trash can, recoiling instantly with a scrunched face, as flies buzzed and grimy brick walls formed a dark frame.

The same A tiny baby sat back on dirty asphalt, wrinkling nose in disgust, the overflowing trash cans spilling refuse behind while food wrappers scattered widely across the grimy, litter-strewn street corner.
